drafts.body:
Hi Sam,

Thank you for reaching out and expressing interest in a product demo. Friday, July 17 at 1:00 PM Central works perfectly for us. I've confirmed the time and we're all set for your 30-minute demo session.

I'll send over a calendar invite shortly with the meeting details and Zoom link. If you have any questions or need to reschedule, just let me know.

Looking forward to speaking with you then!

Best regards,
Sales Team
